review_text: Horrible no5 working, called hotline they said they can't find this station in their system. And hanged up…. Horrible services
This terminal is nowhere to be found in the parking lot 😦
Impossible to disconnect the terminals, lousy customer service hangs up on me while they look for a solution and then doesn't answer me anymore.
Finally, a supercharger in Geneva. With limited charging for EVs in this city a Tesla supercharger is a big advantage.
Worst placement unclear if you need to pay or not. No signs telling you where it is. Just garbage!

The access is not obvious to find. You need to enter into the parking lot and get to floor P1. There are lots of stalls and charging is fast. But space is tight and it is not easy to maneuver into a charging spot. It is also not clear, if you stay less than 1 hour, if you need to go to a ticketing station to validate the ticket you were given at the entrance or whether the number plate recognition system recognizes, when you exit, that you do not need to pay.
Not very easy to find, not clear that they are at the 1st floor. However very nice connected to a great shopping mall.
On the 1st floor of P3 parking. There is no signage indicating where it is. Park close to the supercharger as the space is for forward parking and the cables are very short.
Fantastic place, good price (considering Switzerland and fastcharging) and the sound of people trying to sing karaoke adds to the experience
Really good location. Fast and reliable charging.
Very close to the highway! Fast charging! Very new!

4 charging stations with 8 charging points. DKV card not accepted via RFID. Another driver who arrived at the same time and also wanted to charge was unable to pay with their credit card. Poorly lit, no roof. McDonald's nearby.
The seats are a good size, allowing for proper cable handling. Overall, I appreciate Gofast.
Very bad cant launch from move app...
When will the price of a kilowatt-hour be clearly displayed? Imagine going to a supermarket and not having the price of milk displayed; you would find that unacceptable.
Expensive, unavailable half the time, and the helpdesk is totally unprofessional.
abb charger, doesn't work with plugsurfing and I didnt get it to workt with the app either.
I tried to charge my car twice.. both times the charge stopped mid-way for no reason. Money was not the issue, because the allowance was greater than the amount charged...
Very easy to use payment system and good variety of food and drinks in the migrolino shop.
Well located, easy to access
I come here in the morning to recharge my model 3, it works perfectly fine. I do my emails and leave within 40 minutes (5->80%) without paying any parking fees.
The best Supercharger in western Switzerland. The Novotel offers you a wonderful place to sit and have a coffee. The hotel offers great meeting rooms for professional reunions as well.

Humiliating experience. It's in the back of a Novotel, not a very nice one at that. It's paid parking. Except for the hotel, there's absolutely nothing around to bide the time while charging. I went by day, but I wouldn't feel safe going there in the dark, especially because there is no public lights. Cannot recommend.
Private parking 2.-/h, but there's actually 1 free hour but you have to go inside the hotel to know about it. Terrible experience for first time users and peak charging at 63kWh.
Very slow charging. The first charger we tried worked for 10 minutes or so, then stopped charging altogether.
Everything went fine. Max. limit for using the charger is 60 minutes. Charging was successful and fast. Toilets are free in the nearby school and during the day also the Cafe is open.
Good charge even if a little slower than Ionity, but much cheaper if you don't have an Ionity subscription
When there is no one its ok. As soon as another car arrives it stops working.
It says 300kw, but does 52....

This charging station is terrible; the plug isn't compatible, charging is slower than advertised, and the parking spaces are very poorly monitored! When will there be full police presence around the parking areas? I'm worried about my safety and the safety of my car.
Every time we go to France, we stop here to charge. It's always worked perfectly. Since we always charge very early in the morning, it's a shame there are no restrooms. McDonald's is closed then.
The extension cord is not long enough and there is no way to park the car in any other direction to get closer.
In some places, the plugs weren't functional
5 CHF just for parking, before charging. That's excessive.
Terminal favoring a good location.
Nothing works, still problems with the app and charging stations.
Charging peak regularly between 35 and 45 kW. Battery hot, less than 15%
38kW today…
Medium speed charge and many chargers available. Very central and good parking!
Well equipped for charging your car or scooter.
It is almost impossible to find behind the hotel in the paid parking lot inside on the terrace, right entrance.
The 50kW station does not exist!
In theory the charger can be used by 2 cars but only one spot to park 🙄
Sort it out!! Why EV pass or other charge cards not working when they used to. Don't operate if you can't service
Doesn't accept any charging card. Useless
Zero! 3 sockets, 1 place, forced to download an app, run away! Really not practical, the engineer had to drink 4 L of gentian before giving the plan to quality control who were asleep.

Overpriced, 50kW instead of the promised 100kW, even though there's only one charging station. Everything has to be registered through the app, and charging takes over 20 minutes. CHF 0.75 per kW is too much. Direct payment with KC or Twint isn't possible. It's best to avoid it.

The 22kW charging station works perfectly. The parking space is generously sized. Two outlets are available. Please remember to pay the parking fee in this parking lot, or you'll be fined! The police of Lutry are watching!
Doesn't work
None of the CCS chargers would work. One hors service, one without a QR code, the third internal error.
81c/kwh autogrill, view

Horrible experience. At night in the rain, nothing worked or was visible. We had to call several times and ended up soaked and freezing. The charging stations have a deplorable design and reliability.
The card isn't working for the first time; it's only charging at 44kW even though the battery is empty!
Easy to access from the highway, but pricey (0.87 chf/kW) and power of recharge lower than announced (50-70kW vs 130kW).
Used it several times. Works very well but at 40-70kwh rather than the 300 advertised. And it's expensive!

Unfortunately, you should never rely on this charging station! It never works, I don't understand why it appears as a charging option on apps. For years we have never been able to charge our car there, despite informing the company several times.
Too expensive!! 1.02CHF kw/h is a steal!
Some users are plugged in without charging their vehicles, but the app doesn't detect it. So when we arrive on site, there's no space.

Everything is perfect at this location! The 50 kW is ideal for the location. I arrived with 30% state of charge. I had dinner at a Thai restaurant and left again with 93% SOC. Very straightforward payment options without registration required. I'm very impressed.
Both chargers fail to start charging
It worked for me, however, for the moment it is not compatible with Swisscharge and you need the Eni app in this case.
Rather reliable, but often busy, even outside of events and rush hours. It's not rare that it's occupied from noon. To the parking management: please add more stations!
Currently out of service 😡😡
The charging stations are hidden in level 2 of the parking deck. After trying 4-5 times, we couldn't get the station to work.
Doesn't work. Tried 3 times with both chargers.
Out of service for months

There were three working EvPass charging stations in the Public Parking space at the Plaza. Marked with green floor and within the circling spiral going down on the very first level you reach. Parking was paid at reception, charging by EvPass App. Both 22kW and 7kW chargers.
I was unable to charge
5 terminals in the Palace parking lot... none were in service....
This charging station does not exist!!!
Operational, yet received only 11kW while plugging into the 22kW. Took a long time, I had to stop the charge before my initial fill up target.
Unfortunately, there was insufficient energy available; it was only charged at 5kW the entire time.
Both stations were not working due to system error. QR code was useless as no internet is available in the parking
Large parking spaces, good charger, unfortunately no reception in the garage (had to go out briefly to start) and one of the two plugs was defective.
Great charger. There's a device at the exit where you can easily pay with your card. 22 kWh
Apparently they are unable to charge Polestar 2 and BMW cars (according to the valet parking team)
Attention, attention... there is no charger available here.......
Used the 300kW fast charger several times during my stay. Never got more than 125kW out of it though, and sometimes as little as 77kW, so took much longer than expected.
Reliable and with a nice view

Every time I've come, there have been charging stations available. My charging speed was limited to 65 kWh by the vehicle. The price is reasonable. Payment is easy with a card or an app. Restrooms are nearby.
Great charging station, with enough space to even accommodate a truck! The only thing missing is a vending machine with coffee or snacks to complete the experience.
Supposedly a 300kW fast charger, but in reality it's more like 90-120kW. However, they haven't hesitated to raise their prices since January 2025!
Possible to charge with dedicated card and with credit cards. Nicely placed on highway but not much going on here, one snack bar but it was closed. Up to 300 kwh charging speed.

Autocharge worked seamlessly, excellent fast charger. Minimal facilities, toilet block and a fast food unit. Set just off the main road, but with excellent views of the lake and nearby mountains. Nice setting to stretch the legs while a quick charge top-up before heading over the mountains.
I haven't seen a charging station with a better view yet. Almost worth a trip :)
Advertised at 300kW, only 33kW available. What a rip-off.
Works great. Easy payment. Charges fast.
It's maxing out at 74 kW, perhaps because both lots are charging at the same time so it would mean the 160 kW is split.
It worked for me with my MER card. Tamoil gas station. You can easily pass the time with the restaurants and shops nearby. Unfortunately, the charging process stopped at 80%.
I had to press the emergency stop button first, after which it worked for two minutes, then started again, and after about four minutes I stopped charging. So be careful when planning this station.
Both pumps are out of order. The parking spaces are so inconvenient that parking a car is an art. The whole area looks very neglected.
It worked perfectly. Used QR code and paid via the browser link. No problem at all. First connect to the car, then authorize payment via credit card.
Technically, the charging stations seem to be working, but after entering all the data, the message 'The charging process cannot be started.' It's a shame.
Two parking spaces, one indicated as broken, the second which is supposed to work is not broken!
No. It didn't work today, February 28, 2025!
well, i only come by every 5 or 6 months, but this is at least the second time this metal recycling pile hasn't worked :-(
There are only 4 charging stations in the entire parking lot; it would be nice if at least they were working…
I tried starting the charge 4 times. It failed 4 times. It booked 50 chf per each charge. So now I'm 200chf down and still not charged. This is my first ever bad review!
Charging completed successfully. The charging station delivers the expected power. Easy to use and payment via app, Twint, or card is possible.
Excellent station for fast charging 👍
Super 🤩  🚘
What a beautiful location! I felt such satisfaction driving past this magnificent spot in my Renault ZOE, a spot I had painstakingly negotiated with the CHUV management several years ago.

Mobility Point with 4 parking spaces, located a 2-minute walk from the M2 metro station (Grancy stop) and 7 minutes from the train station. If you are coming directly from Lausanne train station, it's best to walk; you'll save time.
Charger is just fine as usual with Tesla. The restaurant next to the charger is a farce. Only open to gamble and not to eat. Skip if you can.
Right next to the highway, many spots, no complaints.

Charger near a casino or a restaurant always booked that only opens from 12… so people with children cannot get any food. This location is plain stupid. Perfect for those who like to play some poker while the car is charging.
Easy to find, close from Geneva and highway!
No issues, need to download app and add payment.
Didn't charge, have mobilize charge card. It was 1845, pathetic…
